mapper.sql: relation.tenant_id, profile.supplier_dept_id, profile.legal_name, profile.unified_social_credit_code, relation.enterprise_verification_status AS verification_status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_supplier_tenant_relation relation JOIN t_supplier_org_profile profile ON profile.supplier_dept_id = relation.supplier_dept_id WHERE relation.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND relation.supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND relation.status <> 'DISABLED' AND relation.enterprise_verification_status <> 'DISABLED' AND profile.verification_status <> 'DISABLED' ORDER BY relation.relation_id LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM t_supplier_tenant_relation relation JOIN t_supplier_org_profile profile ON profile.supplier_dept_id = relation.supplier_dept_id WHERE relation.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND relation.supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND relation.status <> 'DISABLED' AND relation.enterprise_verification_status <> 'DISABLED' AND profile.verification_status <> 'DISABLED' ORDER BY relation.relation_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE OF relation, profile
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_supplier_enterprise_verification ( tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, legal_name_snapshot, unified_social_credit_code_snapshot, verification_method, provider_code, source_code, provider_request_id, provider_result_code, verification_result, business_status, result_message, inconsistent_fields_json, evidence_reference, remark, operator_account_id, operator_user_id, operator_role_key, simulated, verified_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{supplierDeptId}, #{legalNameSnapshot}, #{unifiedSocialCreditCodeSnapshot}, #{verificationMethod}, #{providerCode}, #{sourceCode}, #{providerRequestId}, #{providerResultCode}, #{verificationResult}, #{businessStatus}, #{resultMessage}, CAST(#{inconsistentFieldsJson} AS JSONB), #{evidenceReference}, #{remark}, #{operatorAccountId}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorRoleKey}, CASE WHEN #{simulated} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{verifiedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_supplier_org_profile SET unified_social_credit_code = COALESCE(unified_social_credit_code, #{unifiedSocialCreditCode}), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND (unified_social_credit_code IS NULL OR unified_social_credit_code = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode})

UPDATE t_supplier_tenant_relation SET enterprise_verification_status = #{verificationStatus}, current_enterprise_verification_id = #{verificationId}, enterprise_verified_by_user_id = #{verifiedByUserId}, enterprise_verified_at = #{verifiedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND status <> 'DISABLED' AND enterprise_verification_status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.select: SELECT verification_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, legal_name_snapshot, unified_social_credit_code_snapshot, verification_method, provider_code, source_code, provider_request_id, provider_result_code, verification_result, business_status, result_message, inconsistent_fields_json::TEXT AS inconsistent_fields_json, evidence_reference, remark, operator_account_id, operator_user_id, operator_role_key, simulated = 1 AS simulated, verified_at FROM t_supplier_enterprise_verification WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} ORDER BY verified_at DESC, verification_id DESC
